name: yao-chatgpt-crawler
input_files: required standard inputs: repeat count, target entity, entity type, OpenCLI profile, and single-query interval preset
optional OPENAI_API_KEY for AI semantic review
output_contract: summary.json analysis metrics with target entity recognition, semantic review status, and same-type competitor comparison
structured-data.md Markdown export of cleaned structured fields, semantic labels, and analysis tables
structured-data.xlsx Excel workbook with the same structured sheets as the Markdown export

report.html Kami-styled visual report with overview, directory, metric explanations, semantic entity classification, probability tables, target-vs-competitor module, clickable citations with unique compact URL labels, GEO trend projections, and capped detail lists
semantic-review-cache.json optional AI semantic-review cache when reusable classifications are produced
rollback_boundary: The skill writes local artifacts only to the selected run output directory. Fresh crawling creates ChatGPT web conversations and may switch the current ChatGPT mode when --model is used; it does not modify external source projects.
local_dependencies: ChatGPT web session that can send messages
ChatGPT Web Search availability for source-analysis runs
Bundled scripts/chatgpt_browser_crawl.mjs using the OpenCLI chatgpt adapter
Bundled scripts/test_chatgpt_batch_delay.mjs for delay strategy regression checks
Optional OPENAI_API_KEY for AI semantic review during analysis
